phases.name: Product Spine
phases.showable: The app has a coherent first screen, primary navigation, and core workflow spine.
phases.doneSignal: Core routes, navigation, and first-screen job are coherent, with old surfaces still reachable.
phases.nextCriteria: Move to Phase 2 when remaining work is mostly visual system and polish.
phases.reviewOutcome: Phase 1 established the product spine. Phase 2 should refine the visual system without expanding scope.
tasks: - [ ] Phase 1 - Navigation spine slice: make one small frontend-only improvement to primary navigation and route grouping. Acceptance: run the configured build command. [class:design risk:medium mode:single impact:visible surface:app scope:src/ accept:build]

- [ ] Phase 1 - First-screen job slice: make one small frontend-only improvement so the first screen clearly communicates the primary job. Acceptance: run the configured build command. [class:design risk:medium mode:single impact:visible surface:app scope:src/ accept:build]
- [ ] Phase 1 - Review packet: run checks and write docs/codex/PHASE_1_REVIEW.md. Do not start Phase 2. [class:proof risk:low mode:single impact:planning surface:docs scope:docs/codex/ accept:build]

phases.name: Visual System
phases.showable: The app looks intentional, consistent, and appropriately styled for its audience.
phases.doneSignal: Tokens, typography, spacing, surfaces, and mobile density feel coherent.
phases.nextCriteria: Move to Phase 3 when remaining work is feature depth.
phases.reviewOutcome: Phase 2 established the visual foundation. Phase 3 should build feature depth.
tasks: - [ ] Phase 2 - Visual token slice: refine shared visual tokens/styles. Acceptance: run the configured build command. [class:design risk:medium mode:single impact:visible surface:app scope:src/ accept:build]

- [ ] Phase 2 - Mobile visual slice: improve mobile density or readability on one high-traffic route. Acceptance: run the configured build command. [class:design risk:medium mode:single impact:visible surface:app scope:src/ accept:build]
- [ ] Phase 2 - Review packet: run checks and write docs/codex/PHASE_2_REVIEW.md. Do not start Phase 3. [class:proof risk:low mode:single impact:planning surface:docs scope:docs/codex/ accept:build]
